title: Assign value to element in Name column through automation
excerpt:
It would be useful to be able to assign the element’s default value to the Name column, through automation. 
For example, assign to Name the concatenation of the values of two other columns.

posts.author: Flow-at-work (Marcio Augusto Lopes de Campos)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be useful to be able to assign the element’s default value to the Name column, through automation.
For example, assign to Name the concatenation of the values of two other columns.
